title: arenaria intermedia
intro: Arenaria intermedia, commonly known as sea sandwort, is a low-growing, succulent plant species in the carnation family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Arenaria intermedia include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. In herbal preparations, Arenaria intermedia is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
